title: P2P proteomics -- data sharing for enhanced protein identification.
author: Schorlemmer M Abian J Sierra C de la Cruz D Bernacchioni L Jaen E Perreau de Pinninck A Atencia M
content:
S-EPMC3298698 PMC3298698 P2P proteomics -- data sharing for enhanced protein identification.

Background

In order to tackle the important and challenging problem in proteomics of identifying known and new protein sequences using high-throughput methods, we propose a data-sharing platform
